assistants.name: Nanny Assistant
assistants.purpose: Household continuity, child routines, safety notes, family standards, and caregiver support.

assistants.name: House Manager Assistant
assistants.purpose: Vendors, home maintenance, household operations, recurring tasks, and property routines.

assistants.name: Trainer / Coach Assistant
assistants.purpose: Fitness goals, coaching routines, injuries, progress history, schedules, and wellness planning.

assistants.name: Family Office Assistant
assistants.purpose: Governance, document intelligence, advisor coordination, reporting workflows, and institutional continuity.

assistants.name: PMA Assistant
assistants.purpose: Member onboarding, education, communications, procedures, events, and internal operations.

assistants.name: Portfolio Marketing Agent
assistants.purpose: Campaigns, copy, offers, funnels, customer research, positioning, and growth playbooks.
